---
title: identical-switch-branches
description: "Detect repeated switch branches."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect repeated switch branches. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
switch value { case 1: run(); case 2: run() }
```

## Good

```go
switch value { case 1: one(); case 2: two() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only identical-switch-branches`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
